title: Reform of the taxation of securitisation companies
body: "This consultation seeks views on making changes to clarify and/or reform certain aspects of:   the taxation of securitisation companies, as set out in the Taxation of Securitisation Companies Regulations (Statutory Instrument 2006/3296) the Stamp Duty loan capital exemption (section 79 Finance Act 1986) as it applies to securitisations and to insurance-linked securities   This consultation will be of particular interest to taxpayers, investors, advisers and tax professionals concerned with securitisations or insurance-linked securities.  "

taxons.title: Stamp duty and other tax on property
